function.name: erabi_register
function.description: Join the Erabi intent exchange: generates a keypair and self-registers this agent with the given capabilities. Returns the agent id. Zero human steps.

accepts_sponsored.description: Opt in to monetizing moments of choice (default false)

function.name: erabi_discover
function.description: Find providers for a capability, ranked organically by reputation × freshness with public evidence trails.

function.name: erabi_intent
function.description: Fire a moment of choice. Returns organic candidates plus clearly labeled sponsored candidates; every sponsored entry carries a signed, publicly verifiable DisclosureRecord. The query must be PII-free.

function.name: erabi_report_outcome
function.description: Report a signed outcome event for a provider chosen from a consideration set. Outcomes only confirm with the counterparty's signature.
